name: NZ Post eShip Setup
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can set up NZ Post eShip integration to work with Neto by following the guide on the eShip website."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Important:","bold":true},{"text":" NZ Post is supported only via eShip."}]}],"appearance":"alert"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We recommend that the "},{"text":"Pack","bold":true},{"text":" be entered in the order status field in step 4 of their guide, as orders should not be exported for consignments until this order status is met."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" If orders coming into Neto go straight to the \""},{"text":"Pick","bold":true},{"text":"\" status, you will need to enter \""},{"text":"Pick","bold":true},{"text":"\" or \""},{"text":"Pack","bold":true},{"text":"\" in the order status to make sure all orders are imported."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
